backend/main.mo: Main actor defining Payment and PaymentMode types with functions to submit payments (with multiple invoice numbers and payment modes), clear all payments, and query payments by user, invoice number, or payment mode. Includes migration support and list-based storage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old single-invoice, single-mode payment records into new multi-invoice, multi-mode payment records, extracting amounts and dates from mode-specific fields into a unified PaymentMode structure.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: button size reduction, invoice number text input, multiple payment mode selection, and multiple invoice number entry, all with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files including the main app structure, payment entry form with multi-mode/multi-invoice support, flattened payment table with compact buttons, React Query hooks, Excel export utility, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for background, foreground, borders, and component colors with mobile-optimized styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag for mobile responsiveness, root div for React mounting, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with header, two sections (payment entry form and payment records table), and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PaymentEntryForm: Payment entry form with checkbox selection for NEFT/Cheque modes, comma-separated alphanumeric invoice number input, conditional field display for selected modes, validation, and form submission using React Query mutation with success/error handling.
frontend/src/components/PaymentReportTab: Payment records table that flattens multi-invoice/multi-mode payments into individual rows, displays loading/error states, and provides compact Clear Records and Download Excel buttons with confirmation dialog and loading indicators.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for payment operations: fetching all payments, submitting new payments with invoice numbers and payment modes, and clearing all payments with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, mobile-optimized input sizing (16px to prevent iOS zoom), and minimum touch target heights (44px).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/utils/dateFormat.ts: Utility function to format date strings into MM/DD/YYYY format with error handling, returning '-' for invalid or empty dates.
frontend/src/utils/excelExport.ts: Exports payment records to CSV format by flattening payment data (one row per payment mode per invoice) and triggering browser download with formatted headers and date values.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, responsive container settings, extended border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a mobile-friendly payment entry app with dynamic NEFT/Cheque forms, localStorage persistence, Excel export, and minimal UI optimized for low-end Android devices.
